inline_content: Meeting minutes from board meeting on January 5, 2024. Attendees discussed Q4 results and approved the FY25 operating plan. No funds were raised or deployed in the quarter.
notes: Meeting minutes with no PE/fund terms — must not be force-classified as LPA.

inline_content: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement. Each party agrees to hold in confidence all Confidential Information received from the other party for a period of three (3) years from the Effective Date. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.
notes: Governing-law clause alone must NOT trigger LPA classification.

inline_content:
SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT — Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P.

The undersigned (the "Subscriber") hereby subscribes for a Capital Commitment of USD 25,000,000 to Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. (the "Partnership"). The Subscriber makes the representations and warranties set forth in Section 4 (Investor Representations), including that it is an "accredited investor" within the meaning of Rule 501 of Regulation D.
notes: Prototypical subscription agreement — capital commitment + accredited investor rep.

inline_content: SIDE LETTER dated as of March 15, 2024, between Horizon Alpha GP, LLC (the "General Partner") and State Pension Fund of Example (the "Investor"). Reference is made to the Amended and Restated Limited Partnership Agreement of Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. (the "Partnership Agreement"). The General Partner agrees to grant the Investor a reduced management fee of 1.5% per annum and most-favored-nation (MFN) rights with respect to economic terms granted to any other investor with a commitment of USD 50,000,000 or less.
notes: Mentions LPA and fee — must not be mis-classified as LPA. Key signal: 'SIDE LETTER' header + MFN rights.

inline_content:
Dear Limited Partners,

We are pleased to report that Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. delivered a gross IRR of 18.3% in Q4 2024. During the quarter the Partnership called USD 35 million of Capital Commitments and made three new investments.
notes: LP letter — mentions LPA by reference but is correspondence, not the agreement itself.

inline_content:
# SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT

This Subscription Agreement ('Agreement') is entered into between Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. (the 'Partnership') and the undersigned Subscriber, a state pension trust, for a Capital Commitment of $50,000,000.

## 1. Investor Representations
Subscriber represents it is a 'qualified purchaser' within the meaning of Section 2(a)(51) of the Investment Company Act.

## 2. Commitment
Subscriber hereby irrevocably commits to contribute $50,000,000 to the Partnership as and when called by the General Partner.
notes: Institutional subscription agreement with commitment, representations, and qualified-purchaser language.

inline_content:
# SIDE LETTER

This Side Letter is delivered in connection with the Subscription Agreement between Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. and Canadian Sovereign Fund.

## Most Favored Nations
If the General Partner grants any other limited partner economic terms more favorable than those contained herein, those terms shall be offered to Canadian Sovereign Fund on a Most Favored Nations basis.

## Confidentiality Waiver
Canadian Sovereign Fund is subject to public-records disclosure laws and shall not be in breach of the LPA for such disclosures.
notes: Side letter with MFN + confidentiality carve-out.

inline_content:
# CAPITAL CALL NOTICE NO. 3

Date: March 15, 2026

To: Limited Partners of Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P.

Pursuant to Section 4.2 of the Limited Partnership Agreement, the General Partner hereby calls 8% of each Limited Partner's Capital Commitment, payable by wire transfer no later than March 30, 2026.

Purpose: new investment in Project Helios.
notes: Transactional capital-call notice — NOT the LPA itself. Should not be classified as LPA.

inline_content:
# CONFIDENTIAL PRIVATE PLACEMENT MEMORANDUM

Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. — a Delaware limited partnership.

## Executive Summary
Horizon Equity Partners IV is a $750 million North-American mid-market buyout fund.

## Risk Factors
Investment in the Partnership involves substantial risk, including illiquidity, loss of capital, and reliance on the General Partner's investment judgment.

## Terms Summary
See accompanying LPA for definitive terms. This document is for discussion purposes only and is not an offer to sell.
notes: PPM: marketing/offering memo. Has PE vocabulary but is explicitly NOT the LPA; should classify as Other.

inline_content:
# ADVISORY COMMITTEE MINUTES
Horizon Equity Partners IV — Q1 2026 Advisory Committee meeting

Attendees: 5 LP representatives, General Partner team.

## Items Discussed
1. Approval of conflicted co-investment transaction in Project Titan (consent granted).
2. Review of Q4 2025 valuation methodology.
3. ESG reporting update.

## Votes
Consent for Project Titan: 4 for, 0 against, 1 abstain.
notes: Governance minutes, not an LPA or subscription doc.

inline_content:
# FUND ADMINISTRATION AGREEMENT

This Agreement is between Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. (the 'Fund') and ACME Fund Services LLC (the 'Administrator').

## Scope of Services
Administrator shall provide: (a) daily NAV calculation, (b) investor onboarding and KYC, (c) capital-call and distribution processing, (d) financial statement preparation.

## Fees
Annual administration fee: 0.08% of Net Asset Value, billed quarterly.
notes: Service agreement with a third-party administrator — not an LPA, side letter, or subscription.
